subject: [com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee] Your app has received a Diagnostics Report
body:
[com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee] Your app has received a Diagnostics Report 
.block-content-body a:hover {
text-decoration: underline;
}
.block-content-button a:hover {
filter: brightness(1.1);
}
.block-content-button a:active {
filter: brightness(1);
}
.footer-social a:hover {
opacity: 1;
}
.footer-legal-unsubscribe:hover {
text-decoration: underline;
}

Hi Dylan Rajasekaram,



Your app Tuya Unified has received a diagnostics report.



You can reply to this e-mail to get in touch with the user. Note that the user will then be able to see your e-mail address.
